language.title: Language
language.label: Interface language
language.help: Choose the interface language. English is the default. The app remembers your choice.

riotApi.title: Riot API
riotApi.keyHelp: The key is used only locally to load match stats (Emerald+ ranks), the tier list and the current match. Get a key at developer.riotgames.com → API Keys. A development key lasts 24 hours; on 401, create a new one. On 403, open your app on the Riot portal, enable the LoL products (Summoner, Match, Spectator, League, etc.), save and create a new key if needed.
riotApi.riotIdHelp: Full Riot ID with the tag (as in the client, e.g. Player#RU1). Plain summoner names no longer work in the Riot API.
riotApi.invalidRiotId: Riot ID must be in the Name#TAG format (e.g. Player#RU1).

lcu.title: LCU / draft
lcu.help: Ban and pick data is read from your PC via the local client API (LCU). If the draft doesn't update in the app, click "Check LCU" (best during champion select).
lcu.leaguePathHelp: If League is installed in a non-standard folder, set the path to the folder containing the lockfile (next to LeagueClient.exe). Leave empty for auto-detection of standard paths.

window.title: Window
window.desktopOnly: Window settings (always-on-top, position and size) are available only in the desktop app.
window.boundsHelp: Window position and size are saved on move and close. You can also save now:

debug.title: Riot API debug
debug.help: Checks the whole Riot API chain for any Riot ID — your own game isn't needed. Use a challenger who is in a match right now (visible on op.gg), e.g. Name#RU1.
debug.enterRiotId: Enter a Riot ID in the Name#TAG format.
debug.enterKey: Enter the Riot API key above first.
debug.noGame: Account found, no active game — Account-V1 and Spectator-V5 work.
debug.gameFound: Game found! All three APIs work. Players: {{names}}
